# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_disks (Data Source)

Used to retrieve the disks (system and data) of a Public Cloud VM instance.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List the disks of a VM.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_disks" "all" {
  virtual_machine_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
}

output "data_disk_sizes" {
  value = [for d in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_disks.all.disks : d.size_gb if !d.is_primary]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `virtual_machine_id` (String) The ID of the VM whose disks are listed.

### Read-Only

- `disks` (List of Object) The list of disks attached to the VM. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--disks))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--disks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disks`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `is_primary` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `position` (Number)
- `size_gb` (Number)
- `storage_type` (String)
